issues.sample: I bought a brand new 2023 CRV Hybrid Sport and am having issues with the steering.  When at speeds greater than 20 mph , the steering becomes stiff and hard to maneuver. It makes it impossible to swerve out of the way of a dangerous life threatening situation in front of a driver

On highway this Honda CR-V was hit by another vehicle 2013 doge at right rear side. Other car was sliding on the road , crossing the lanes and hitting the CR-V. Side airbags were deployed immediately during primary collision. CR-V didn’t stop after that. It turned left from right

narrative.headline: What 2023 Honda Cr-V owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 499 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (64% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
